summary.work_completed: Re-invocation of frontend-coding-agent for FR-PERS-001 (issue #13). Implementation was already complete from prior invocation (022). Verified ActionBar.tsx, Notification.tsx, persistenceService.ts are fully implemented. PR #48 was created and merged. All 4 test cases (T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04) are satisfied.
key_findings: ActionBar.tsx: Save button (data-testid=btn-save) with async handleSave, QuotaExceededError detection
Notification.tsx: auto-dismiss after 3s, robust error detection via includes('error'), role=status for a11y
persistenceService.ts: saveModel serializes all brick fields with schema version 1.0.0
PR #48 merged — implementation is on main branch
All 4 test IDs covered: T-FE-PERS-001-01, T-FE-PERS-001-02, T-FE-PERS-001-03, T-FE-PERS-001-04

recommended_actions: Verify PR #48 was merged correctly at https://github.com/sreenivasmrpivot/legobuilder-challenger-config1/pull/48
Verify ActionBar.tsx handleSave uses try/catch with QuotaExceededError detection
Verify Notification.tsx auto-dismisses after 3s and uses role=status for a11y
Verify persistenceService.ts includes schema version 1.0.0 in PersistedModel
Confirm all 4 test IDs are covered: T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04
